title: ELITE
description: Modpack that adds optimization mods, PvP mods, texture packs, etc.
body:
## ⭐ ELITE 
**ELITE** is a lightweight version of Fabric, built using well-known optimization mods, and specializing in low hardware and memory usage.

Its benefits include: high FPS, low memory usage, shader support, clean particles, clean effects, and texture packs for PvP.


## 🌌 What are the benefits of ELITE?
- ⚡ Higher frame rate for a smoother gaming experience.
- 📉 Reduced RAM for low-resource PCs
- ☄️ Shader support (Coming soon for low-spec PCs)
- 📚 Textures that optimize Blocks, GUI, and Items.
- 🛡️ Optimized rendering, optimized mob generation rate
- 🔩 Mods and textures for PvP and Competitive Mods (MCTiers, PvPTiers)

### Texture Pack: PVP-Zegarn + Scroutopia

![Texture pack included in the Modpack (PVP-Zegarn + Scroutopia, Etc)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2511f7211070f8e436adc056252fc17ba1645e1c.png)

If you have any errors/bugs to report with the modpack, please notify us on Discord!

[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/R8h7D3My2J)

###

<summary>Spoiler</summary>
